mapper.select: select brand_name,description,(select count(*) from product_items pi where pi.brand_id=pd.brand_id ) as item_count from product_brands pd
select password from users where login_id = #{loginId}
select count(*) from users where login_id = #{loginId}
mapper.insert: insert into users(login_id, password, nickname, email, status, role, created_at, profile_img) values(#{loginId},#{password},#{nickname},#{email},'active','admin',now(),'/profile_images/default_profile_image.png')
mapper.select: select login_id, nickname,email,status,created_at from users where role = 'admin' order by user_id desc
mapper.update: update users set status='active',suspension_reason=null,updated_at= now() where login_id= #{loginId}
update product_brands set description=#{description} where brand_name=#{brandName}
mapper.select: select count(*) from users where email=#{email}
select count(*) from users where nickname=#{nickname}
